---
name: New Test
about: Suggest a new test to add to an existing Interface (e. g. I2C bus-arbitration)
title: "[New Test]"
labels: test-request
assignees: ''

---

**Which existing interface does this target?**
e. g. link to existing tests, link to "New Interface"-Issue

**Describe what the new test should cover**
e. g. Write/Read transaction, Error cases, Drop behavior, `async` cancelation

**Which documentation or standards exist for the behavior to test?**
e. g. errata, HAL issues, application notes, datasheets, standards, test procedures

**Can this test be simulated with PIO or bit-banging?**
If so, are there any examples? If not, what is needed additionally?

**Does this test require special hardware, apart of normal GPIO connections?**
e. g. an external PHY, or low pass filter
